protocol_section: Project Owner data handling and withdrawal wording
description: Protocol candidate v0.16 says invitation materials explain the deadline for withdrawal before analysis lock; participant-facing materials promise withdrawal before analysis begins.
reason: Align the protocol documentation to the earlier and safer participant-facing commitment.
affected_records_or_outputs: Documentation candidate only; no participant record or analytical output affected.
temporary_action: Do not treat v0.16 as the final submission copy; prepare a hand-maintained v0.17 replacing only the withdrawal-deadline phrase.
resolution: Applied in Validation_Protocol_PreReg_v0.17.docx: the participant-withdrawal sentence now says “before analysis begins”; the unrelated analytical-freeze use of “analysis lock” remains unchanged.

description: Corrected an unsatisfiable self-referential Git-commit check in the Gate 2 enforcement implementation. The revised guard validates the direct parent of the authorisation commit as the frozen implementation basis.
reason: The prior guard required the receipt basis commit to equal both the manifest implementation-check commit and execution-time HEAD even though the receipt and gate-state change must be committed first.
affected_records_or_outputs: No sample or assignment output; no Record ID; no registered packet artefact; no scientific input or study decision affected.
temporary_action: Replace execution-time HEAD equality with the A-to-B direct-parent handshake; require a tracked canonical JSON receipt and restrict commit B to the explicit administrative allowlist.
resolution: Implemented and synthetic-tested the direct-parent guard. No sampling rule, seed, population, exclusion, stratum, draw order, instrument or analysis decision changed, and no sample had been drawn.
